currentSegment.content: In the quiet village of Eldoria, the sun rises over green hills and golden fields. The villagers are busy preparing for the annual harvest festival. Young Lily, a brave girl with braided hair, watches as her father fixes the decorations in the square.
currentSegment.translation: Na tranquila vila de Eldoria, o sol nasce sobre colinas verdes e campos dourados. Os aldeões estão ocupados se preparando para o festival anual da colheita. A jovem Lily, uma garota corajosa com cabelo trançado, observa enquanto seu pai conserta as decorações na praça.
currentSegment.imageKeyword: A serene village scene at dawn, with the sun casting a golden light over lush green hills. Villagers are bustling about, hanging colorful streamers and arranging fruits. In the foreground, young Lily, a girl with braided hair and a simple dress, stands with curiosity, her eyes bright with excitement.

choices.text: Help Lily decorate the square with flowers.
choices.intent: Lily will be grateful and invite you to the feast.

choices.text: Explore the forest nearby before the festival.
choices.intent: You may find something magical in the woods.

choices.text: Visit the tavern for stories about brave heroes.
choices.intent: You might learn about adventures and challenges.

challenge.question: Qual é a palavra em inglês para "aldeão"?
challenge.explanation: A palavra "villager" significa uma pessoa que vive na vila, enquanto as outras palavras têm significados diferentes.
